sections_cited: section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Income Tax Reference Application No. 05 of 2024 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For order on office objection No. 02 & 34. 2. For order on CMA No. 41/2024 (Exemption) 3. For hearing of main case. 06.11.2025 Mr. Ajeet Sunder, advocate for applicant. Learned counsel states that the controversy before the court has already been decided against the applicant by the honourable Supreme Court vide judgment dated 20.02.2025 in Civil Appeal No. 743 of 2014 and others, therefore, this reference may be dismissed as withdrawn. Order accordingly. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance, 2001. Office is instructed to place copy of this order in the connected file. Judge Judge Ayaz p.s.
